'''Vaskau Farg''' was a [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Findsman/Legends|findsman]] who once tracked a [[Sakiyan/Legends|Sakiyan]] witch to [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]. He did not like cold temperatures and felt that [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]] were an ugly, arrogant race.<ref name="AC">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030206arkania1|series=Arkanian Chill|text=Part 1: A Cold Reception}}</ref>
